_source.name: RAPTOR SCA scan of rails
_source.provenance: Scan output produced by RAPTOR's SCA pipeline against https://github.com/rails/rails.git@v7.1.2. Project source not redistributed.

cookie accepts cookie name, path, and domain with out of bounds characters
